examples: The reservoirs are low porosity and low permeability sandstone and conglomeratic sandstone reservoirs.
Glass steel coring tool is specifically developed for improving the core recovery of conglomeratic weak formation and the core integrality in Liaohe Oilfield.
E2S3 is mainly the interbeds of gray-grayish white conglomeratic sandstone and brown-dark gray mudstone in different thickness and with relatively poor reservoir properties.
